title: Excise duty statistics - Canada.ca
content:
## Excise duty statistics
The excise duty statistics publication presents the amount of excise duty assessed for spirits, wine, beer, and cannabis products. The excise duty statistics are based on information that the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) collected and processed from excise duty remitters within a specific fiscal year (April 1 st to March 31 st ).
Please refer to the Excise duty technical information website for more information.
- 2023 Edition (2021-2022 fiscal year)
- 2022 Edition (2020-2021 fiscal year)
- 2021 Edition (2018-2019 and 2019-2020 fiscal years)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
